creator: heiner_ej@yahoo.de
text:
net-im/libpurple port won't install because of wrong checksum or attack ? :

===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for libpurple-2.5.5_1
===>  Extracting for libpurple-2.5.6
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for pidgin-2.5.6.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for pidgin-2.5.6.tar.bz2.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: pidgin-2.5.6.tar.bz2 pidgin-2.5.6.tar.bz2 
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for libpurple-2.5.5_1

Fix: 

Correct the checksum if it's really wrong
How-To-Repeat: Install or update net-im/libpurple
